creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have the same problem in poudriere:

install   -m 555 /usr/ports/www/uchiwa/files/rc.d/uchiwa /wrkdirs/usr/ports/www/uchiwa/work/stage/usr/local/etc/rc.d/uchiwa
install: /usr/ports/www/uchiwa/files/rc.d/uchiwa: No such file or directory

so $FILESDIR gets expanded to /usr/ports/www/uchiwa/files/rc.d/uchiwa, which
seems wrong.
